news_list.title: Chip giant SK hynix posts record quarterly profit on AI boom
news_list.summary:
Revenue surpassed 50 trillion won for the first time in a single quarter, while operating profit nearly doubled compared to the previous three-month period

Chip giant SK hynix logged a record quarterly net profit on Thursday thanks to the artificial intelligence boom, shrugging off concerns that the Middle East war could drag on the semiconductor industry.

Huge investments from governments and major technology companies are driving frenzied demand for the hardware that powers generative AI tools.

The South Korean firm posted net profit of 40.3 trillion won ($27.2 billion) in the first quarter, up nearly 400 percent year-on-year.

The figure smashed estimates of 29.4 trillion won in a Bloomberg analyst survey.

Revenue surpassed 50 trillion won for the first time in a single quarter, while operating profit nearly doubled compared to the previous three-month period.

"Despite the fact that first quarter is typically a seasonal downturn, strong demand persisted due to expanded investments in AI infrastructure," SK hynix said.

"As AI evolves from large model training to the stage of agentic AI, which repeatedly performs real-time inference across various service environments, the foundation for memory demand is expanding."

The AI boom has pushed up prices and shipments of conventional memory semiconductors, while demand for high-bandwidth memory (HBM) chips, used in AI servers, has soared.

That has caused SK hynix shares to skyrocket by around 600 percent over the past year -- helping push Seoul's benchmark Kospi stock index to record highs.

Along with rival Samsung Electronics, SK hynix is supplying HBM to US industry titan Nvidia for its forthcoming cutting-edge "Vera Rubin" AI platform, expected to further boost the technology's capabilities.

While investors periodically get the jitters over how long the AI boom will last, analysts have said they do not expect the bubble to burst any time soon.

"We expect earnings momentum to remain strong" this year for SK hynix, Kim Young-gun at Mirae Asset Securities said in a note this month.

Reports suggest that memory chip suppliers like SK hynix are entering into long-term supply agreements of three years or more with big tech customers, he wrote.

"In some cases, customers are even seeking options to extend contract durations beyond the initial term, underscoring their emphasis on supply stability."

The rush to build AI data centres has sent orders soaring for HBM, which help the systems process vast amounts of data.

But as chipmakers prioritise the lucrative AI industry, they are producing fewer of the more workaday chips used in everyday consumer electronics like phones and laptops, pushing up device prices.

"Excess demand is expected to persist through the end of the year" for so-called DRAM and NAND memory chips, said a Shinhan Securities report from early April.

That allows "suppliers to maintain the upper hand in pricing power", it said, predicting strong annual results for SK hynix in 2026.

SK hynix said on Thursday that it "plans to continue rolling out new products across both DRAM and NAND flash to address the diversifying memory demand".

It is increasing its chipmaking capacity and plans to spend 19 trillion won to build a new factory in South Korea's Cheongju.

news_list.title: Trading ideas: PetChem, Affin, Willowglen, JAG, Samchem, Jetson, Leform, CapitaLand, United Plantations, AmFirst REIT, AME REIT, Foodie, Mayu, LBS, TAS
news_list.summary:
Kumpulan Jetson Bhd is divesting its adhesives and healthcare trading businesses for RM15.8mn as part of a portfolio rationalisation to focus on its core automotive anti-vibration segment.

Leform Bhd has signed a non-binding MOU with Nippon Steel Trading Corporation to expand steel procurement, prioritise sourcing, and collaborate on technical expertise to improve operational efficiency and supply chain stability.

Capitaland Malaysia Trust reported a strong 1QFY26, with NPI rising 14.7% YoY to RM80.4mn and distributable income up 22.7%, driven by contributions from newly acquired industrial/logistics assets and improved retail performance.

United Plantations Bhd reported a softer 1QFY26 with net profit slipping 1.6% YoY to RM160.7mn despite a 24% rise in revenue, as higher palm oil output and sales were offset by cost pressures and forex-related impacts.

AmFirst Real Estate Investment Trust reported FY26 NPI growth of 5% YoY to RM64.1mn, supported by higher occupancy and rental rates, alongside a stronger DPU of 2.87 sen (+19.6% YoY).

AME Real Estate Investment Trust delivered strong 4QFY26 performance, with NPI rising 28.9% YoY to RM14.94mn and revenue up 26.2%, driven by new acquisitions and positive rental reversions, while DPU increased to 2.16 sen.

Foodie Media Bhd reported 2QFY26 net profit of RM3.19mn (-15.6% QoQ) on revenue of RM13.19mn, driven largely by its content and creator segments.

Mayu Global Group Bhd announced that all previously frozen bank accounts (totalling RM10.7mn) have been fully unfrozen following the revocation of the order by authorities, marking the resolution of its AML-related investigation.

LBS Bina Group Bhd's subsidiary Gerbang Mekar Sdn Bhd has reached a consent judgement to pay RM7mn ex-gratia in instalments to Mega Planner Sdn Bhd (in liquidation), without admission of liability, in relation to a dispute over the M3 Mall sale.

TAS Offshore Bhd has appointed Lau Choo Chin as managing director effective April 30, succeeding Datuk Lau Nai Hoh, who is stepping down due to health reasons.

news_list.title: South Korea economic growth roared past estimates in Q1, thanks to chips
news_list.summary:
SEOUL: South Korea's economy beat expectations in the first quarter of 2026 to recordthe fastest growth since mid-2020, as booming semiconductor demand offset the drag of weak public spending, central bank data showed on Thursday.

Gross domestic product expanded 1.7% in the January-March quarter from the prior three months, the Bank of Korea said, blowing through the median Reuters poll estimate of 1.0% by a wide margin.

The gain marks the strongest quarterly jump since the third quarter of 2020 for Asia's fourth-largest economy, when it was on a post-pandemic rebound.

Growth was driven by a 5.1% jump in exports, led by shipments of "IT components including semiconductors" used in artificial intelligence infrastructure, the BOK said. Private consumption rose 0.5% after showing tentative signs of recovery in January and February as household confidence improved, while government expenditure grew just 0.1%.

Facility investment gained 4.8% after shrinking 1.7% in the last quarter of 2025.

From a year earlier, South Korea's economy grew 3.6%, compared with a 1.6% expansion in the fourth quarter and beating a median estimate for 2.7% growth. - Reuters

news_list.title: IEA: Electricity supply
news_list.summary:
The increase in low-emissions power generation in 2025 outstripped total electricity supply growth

Global electricity generation increased by over 850 TWh in 2025, with renewables accounting for the vast majority of growth. Together, generation from renewables and nuclear power rose by more than the total global increase in generation. In contrast, generation from fossil fuels declined: a modest rise in natural gas-fired generation was outweighed by a decline for coal. Global coal-fired generation fell by around 0.5%, marking the first decrease since the Covid-driven drop in 2020 and the first decline outside of a period of crisis-related disruption since 2015. As a result, in line with previous IEA forecasts, global renewable generation virtually matched coal-fired generation in 2025.

Global renewable generation increased by around 8.5% year-on-year in 2025, slightly slower than the 9.6% rise observed in 2024 but much faster than the around 6% average of the previous decade. This was despite declines in hydropower output in Europe and Eurasia and lower-than-normal wind speeds, particularly in Europe, which tempered growth. Solar PV saw its largest-ever increase in generation, rising by about 600 TWh. About 55% took place in China, but growth was otherwise broad-based geographically.

Annual nuclear generation reached a record high following strong growth in 2024. Output grew by 1.2% in 2025, the result of reactor restarts in Japan, the strong performance of plants in France, and new units that began operations in several countries.

Global coal-fired generation dipped slightly in 2025, following an increase of 1.4% in 2024. The slight decline was in part due to unusual regional patterns. Unlike in recent years, coal-fired electricity output fell in both China and India, while it rose in the United States and declined by less than expected in the European Union. 2025 marked the first time in five decades that China and India saw simultaneous declines. In China, strong growth in renewable and nuclear generation, coupled with slower electricity demand growth than in 2024, helped drive coal-fired output down. In India, coal use declined due to a rapid expansion of renewables and an early and strong monsoon, with renewables posting their largest-ever annual increase. In the United States, higher natural gas prices compared with 2024, strong demand growth and slower coal plant retirements pushed coal-fired generation higher. In the European Union, despite record solar PV output, weak wind and hydropower output resulted in higher gas-fired generation and a small decline in coal-fired generation.

Global natural gas-fired generation increased by around 0.5% in 2025, following an increase of 2.1% in 2024. Gas-fired generation rose strongly in Europe as weather trends boosted demand for heating and cooling. It also increased in the Middle East due to oil-to-gas switching in the power sector, particularly in Saudi Arabia. Global growth was tempered by declines in the United States, where natural gas prices encouraged switching from gas to coal. Outside the Middle East, oil is also increasingly being replaced by renewables and natural gas. As a result, global oil-fired generation declined by around 1.5% in 2025.

Share of low-emissions generation at record high, but coal and gas remain largest sources of electricity

The global electricity generation mix saw a marked increase in power generated from low-emissions sources (renewables and nuclear), which reached 43% in 2025 - the highest level in the last fifty years. The share of renewables in global total electricity generation increased to 34% in 2025, up from 32% in 2024 and 23% a decade ago. The share of wind and solar PV generation together reached 17%, increasing from 15% in 2024, and up from about 5% just a decade ago. At the same time, coal remained the largest source of electricity, providing 34% of global generation. Natural gas was the second-largest source, accounting for 21% of the total.

In emerging market and developing economies such as China, India and Southeast Asia, coal remained the dominant source of electricity. Nevertheless, due to the rapid expansion of low-emissions sources, the share of coal-fired generation in China declined to 55% in 2025, down from 70% a decade ago. In India, it edged down to 71% in 2025 from 74% in 2024 and 76% back in 2015. In Southeast Asia, by contrast, the share of coal-fired generation remained at 48% in 2025, similar to its 2024 share, and up from 37% a decade ago. Renewables increased to 32% of electricity generation across emerging market and developing economies, while nuclear remained at close to 5%.

In advanced economies, renewables provided 36% of electricity generation in 2025, up slightly from the previous year and well above their 24% share a decade ago. Complemented by nuclear power, which accounted for 16%, low-emissions sources generated more than half of electricity in advanced economies in 2025. Among this group, the share of coal has been rapidly declining in recent years, falling from 30% in 2015 to around 16% in 2024 and stabilised at that level in 2025. In the European Union, planned coal phaseouts continued and the share of solar PV and wind reached 30% in 2025, surpassing that of fossil fuels for the first time. In the United Kingdom, which closed its last coal fired power station in 2024, the share of renewables grew to 55%. The United States saw an uptick in coal-fired generation in 2025, with its share rising to 17% from 16% in 2024 amid higher natural gas prices. Natural gas accounted for 40% of US generation in 2025, down from 42% in 2024 but still significantly higher than the 32% share seen a decade ago. In both the European Union and the United States, alongside renewables, nuclear energy continues to play an important role, covering 23% and 18% of generation, respectively.

themes.name: AI 趨動下的半導體產業強勁表現
themes.insight: 人工智慧（AI）的爆炸性成長正強力推動半導體產業，SK hynix 公佈了創紀錄的季度盈利，受惠於 AI 伺服器對高頻寬記憶體（HBM）的需求激增。南韓經濟成長強勁，主要歸功於 AI 基礎設施對半導體出口的帶動。多檔 ETF，如中國信託日本半導體ETF，也反映了市場對此趨勢的關注。
evidence: Chip giant SK hynix posts record quarterly profit on AI boom
South Korea economic growth roared past estimates in Q1, thanks to chips
中國信託日本半導體ETF基金...

themes.name: 全球能源結構轉型與再生能源成長
themes.insight: 國際能源署（IEA）的報告指出，2025 年全球電力供應呈現低排放發電量大幅增加的趨勢，其中再生能源佔比創新高，太陽能光電更是創下有史以來最大的發電量增幅。儘管煤炭仍是主要電力來源，但其佔比正在下滑，天然氣發電增長放緩。此趨勢顯示全球正朝向更清潔的能源結構邁進。
evidence: IEA: Electricity supply
The increase in low-emissions power generation in 2025 outstripped total electricity supply growth
Global renewable generation increased by around 8.5% year-on-year in 2025

themes.name: 東南亞與印度市場的多元發展
themes.insight: 東南亞與印度市場展現出多元的市場動態。馬來西亞公司 Kumpulan Jetson Bhd 正在調整其業務組合，專注於核心汽車防震業務。Leform Bhd 與 Nippon Steel Trading Corporation 簽署備忘錄，擴大鋼材採購合作。Capitaland Malaysia Trust 報告了強勁的第一季度業績，而 United Plantations Bhd 則面臨成本壓力。此外，Foodie Media Bhd 公佈了第二季度財報，Mayu Global Group Bhd 的銀行帳戶已被解凍。
evidence: Trading ideas: PetChem, Affin, Willowglen, JAG, Samchem, Jetson, Leform, CapitaLand, United Plantations, AmFirst REIT, AME REIT, Foodie, Mayu, LBS, TAS
Kumpulan Jetson Bhd is divesting its adhesives and healthcare trading businesses for RM15.8mn
Leform Bhd has signed a non-binding MOU with Nippon Steel Trading Corporation

themes.name: 台灣 ETF 市場的產品多元化
themes.insight: 台灣 ETF 市場持續發展，推出多檔不同主題的 ETF 產品，包括針對小資族的高價 30 ETF、金融及數據 ETF，以及美國創新科技 ETF、台灣卓越成長主動式 ETF 和日本半導體 ETF。此外，也關注高股息策略，推出了臺灣優選成長高股息 ETF 基金，顯示市場對不同投資需求的滿足。
evidence: 1.中國信託特選小資高價30ETF...
2.中國信託特選金融及數據ETF...
3.中國信託美國創新科技ETF基...
4.中國信託台灣卓越成長主動式E...
5.中國信託日本半導體ETF基金...

items.title: 英特爾14A晶片製程迎首位關鍵客戶 馬斯克：特斯拉Terafab將採用
items.summary: 特斯拉 (Tesla)(TSLA-US) 執行長馬斯克 (Elon Musk) 周三 (22 日) 表示，公司計劃在 Terafab 項目中，採用英特爾 (Intel)(INTC-US) 先進的 14A 製程技術生產晶片。

items.title: 不只阿聯 貝森特：多個盟友因伊朗戰事動盪 尋求貨幣互換
items.summary: 美國財政部長貝森特 (Scott Bessent) 周三 (22 日) 表示，許多位於波斯灣 (Persian Gulf) 的美國盟友，因伊朗戰爭引發的經濟動盪，已要求建立金融後盾。

items.title: ServiceNow財報揭中東大型合約延遲 盤後重挫12%
items.summary: 《路透》報導，ServiceNow 周三 (22 日) 表示，中東多筆大型政府合約延遲成交，拖累第一季訂閱營收成長，盤後股價重挫近 12%。

social_topic_heatmap.benchmark: PTT Stock / Google Trends（商業與財經）
social_topic_heatmap.summary: 社群熱度聚焦在 009819、工業 電腦、被動 收入，共有 6 個上升主題。

tech_topic_heatmap.benchmark: 科技主題 / 新聞主線
tech_topic_heatmap.summary: 科技主題熱度集中在 AI 趨動下的半導體產業強勁表現、全球能源結構轉型與再生能源成長、東南亞與印度市場的多元發展，主線仍由新聞主題驅動。

topics.topic: AI 趨動下的半導體產業強勁表現
topics.summary: 人工智慧（AI）的爆炸性成長正強力推動半導體產業，SK hynix 公佈了創紀錄的季度盈利，受惠於 AI 伺服器對高頻寬記憶體（HBM）的需求激增。南韓經濟成長強勁，主要歸功於 AI 基礎設施對半導體出口的帶動。多檔 ETF，如中國信託日本半導體ETF，也反映了市場對此趨勢的關注。
evidence: Chip giant SK hynix posts record quarterly profit on AI boom
South Korea economic growth roared past estimates in Q1, thanks to chips
中國信託日本半導體ETF基金...

topics.topic: 全球能源結構轉型與再生能源成長
topics.summary: 國際能源署（IEA）的報告指出，2025 年全球電力供應呈現低排放發電量大幅增加的趨勢，其中再生能源佔比創新高，太陽能光電更是創下有史以來最大的發電量增幅。儘管煤炭仍是主要電力來源，但其佔比正在下滑，天然氣發電增長放緩。此趨勢顯示全球正朝向更清潔的能源結構邁進。
evidence: IEA: Electricity supply
The increase in low-emissions power generation in 2025 outstripped total electricity supply growth
Global renewable generation increased by around 8.5% year-on-year in 2025

topics.topic: 東南亞與印度市場的多元發展
topics.summary: 東南亞與印度市場展現出多元的市場動態。馬來西亞公司 Kumpulan Jetson Bhd 正在調整其業務組合，專注於核心汽車防震業務。Leform Bhd 與 Nippon Steel Trading Corporation 簽署備忘錄，擴大鋼材採購合作。Capitaland Malaysia Trust 報告了強勁的第一季度業績，而 United Plantations Bhd 則面臨成本壓力。此外，Foodie Media Bhd 公佈了第二季度財報，Mayu Global Group Bhd 的銀行帳戶已被解凍。
evidence: Trading ideas: PetChem, Affin, Willowglen, JAG, Samchem, Jetson, Leform, CapitaLand, United Plantations, AmFirst REIT, AME REIT, Foodie, Mayu, LBS, TAS
Kumpulan Jetson Bhd is divesting its adhesives and healthcare trading businesses for RM15.8mn
Leform Bhd has signed a non-binding MOU with Nippon Steel Trading Corporation

topics.topic: 台灣 ETF 市場的產品多元化
topics.summary: 台灣 ETF 市場持續發展，推出多檔不同主題的 ETF 產品，包括針對小資族的高價 30 ETF、金融及數據 ETF，以及美國創新科技 ETF、台灣卓越成長主動式 ETF 和日本半導體 ETF。此外，也關注高股息策略，推出了臺灣優選成長高股息 ETF 基金，顯示市場對不同投資需求的滿足。
evidence: 1.中國信託特選小資高價30ETF...
2.中國信託特選金融及數據ETF...
3.中國信託美國創新科技ETF基...
4.中國信託台灣卓越成長主動式E...
5.中國信託日本半導體ETF基金...
1.中國信託臺灣優選成長高股息ETF基...

ai_analysis.full_text:
【今日結論】
今日台股開盤，焦點將集中在台積電 ADR 帶動的高溢價能否在盤中維持，以及國際原油價格飆升對供應鏈的實際衝擊。儘管美股續創歷史新高，但市場情緒已轉為「貪婪」，加上原油價的潛在「需求破壞」警訊，操作上需以風險控管為優先，嚴密監控市場情緒反轉與地緣政治風險。
【新聞驅動】
台積電計劃在亞利桑那州增設先進封裝廠，為半導體產業注入信心，這也是推升台積電 ADR 大漲的主要動力。然而，石腦油斷供導致光阻溶劑原料漲價，正直接衝擊晶片業，為短期供應鏈蒙上陰影。地緣政治方面，川普延長對伊朗停火雖暫緩中東緊張，但海峽局勢仍是市場潛在隱憂。
【國際與台股】
昨日美股強勢，S&P 500、Nasdaq 齊創歷史新高，費半亦大漲 2.72%，與日經、KOSPI 的樂觀走勢一致。台積電 ADR 昨夜大漲 5.26%，換算後較現貨高出近 20%，預示今日台積電股價可能走強。然而，CNN 恐懼貪婪指數達 68 (貪婪)，加上原油價格衝破 101.40 美元，是潛在的「需求破壞」警訊，需格外留意。
【KOL與情緒】
CNN 恐懼貪婪指數顯示市場處於「貪婪」區域，意味著短期內追高風險增加，市場情緒可能隨時反轉。美國失業率維持 4% 不變，在過去可能被視為經濟過熱或貨幣緊縮的潛在信號，也加劇了對市場過熱的擔憂。Social_pulse 數據缺失，群眾情緒的判斷需要更多交叉驗證。
【操作含意】
操作上，應優先關注台積電 ADR 溢價的消化情況，並謹慎評估原油飆升對產業鏈的傳導效應。儘管 AI 概念股如輝達、美光仍處於強勢，但整體市場已進入「貪婪」階段，需留意潛在的回調風險。散戶對「南亞科」、「總部」、「009819」等題材的關注度提升，需謹慎判斷是否為趨勢。

selected_charts.title: 多來源新聞主題
selected_charts.description: Gemini 整合後的 3 到 5 個核心新聞主題與來源證據。
selected_charts.takeaway: AI 趨動下的半導體產業強勁表現是當前市場主線，全球能源結構轉型與再生能源成長提供長期趨勢，而東南亞與印度市場的多元發展及台灣 ETF 市場的產品多元化則顯示區域與產品的關注點。
selected_charts.action: 持續關注 AI 相關的半導體族群表現，並留意能源轉型與新興市場的相關動態。

selected_charts.title: 市場情緒
selected_charts.description: CNN 恐懼貪婪、加密貨幣情緒、台灣市場情緒與廣度。
selected_charts.takeaway: 市場情緒偏向「貪婪」，CNN 恐氣貪婪指數為 68，台灣市場情緒為 67，顯示投資人信心增強，但需注意過度樂觀可能帶來的風險。
selected_charts.action: 在樂觀情緒下，留意市場過熱訊號，操作上應以風險控管為重。

selected_charts.title: 科技主題熱度圖
selected_charts.description: 科技新聞主題與市場主線的熱度排名與來源證據。
selected_charts.takeaway: 科技主題熱度由新聞驅動，AI 相關半導體產業表現強勁，而全球能源轉型、東南亞與印度市場發展，以及台灣 ETF 的多元化也受到關注。
selected_charts.action: 深入了解 AI 供應鏈中具有潛力的半導體公司，並關注相關新聞趨勢。

chart_commentary.action: 持續關注 AI 相關的半導體族群表現，並留意能源轉型與新興市場的相關動態。

chart_commentary.action: 在樂觀情緒下，留意市場過熱訊號，操作上應以風險控管為重。

chart_orchestration.overall_summary: 今日為週四盤前報告，市場焦點集中在由 AI 趨動的半導體產業強勁表現，以及台積電 ADR 的大漲。儘管美股普遍上漲，情緒上已進入「貪婪」區域，顯示操作上需以風險控管為優先。原油價格的飆升也是一個潛在風險因素，需密切關注其對供應鏈的實際衝擊。

chart_gap_suggestions.why_needed: 把衝突事件數、致死數與未來風險預測可視化，讓地緣政治對市場的影響更直觀。
chart_gap_suggestions.evidence: 專案已有 ACLED service，但目前未做成可視化圖表。

chart_gap_suggestions.why_needed: 把 PTT 與 Dcard 的熱門討論、看多看空比與主題熱度做成圖，補足市場情緒面。
chart_gap_suggestions.evidence: 現有 trend_pulse 與社群抓取已能提供底層資料。

chart_gap_suggestions.why_needed: 晨報常聚焦 AI / 半導體 / 科技權值，將科技主題與新聞來源拆開呈現會更清楚。
chart_gap_suggestions.evidence: 目前科技內容散落在新聞主題與 AI 分析中，尚未獨立成圖。

headline.teaser: 今日開盤前，幾個關鍵變數值得關注。首先，台積電 ADR 昨夜大漲 5.26%，換算後理論價 2,447.1 元，相較台灣現貨 2,050 元，溢價幅度高達 19.37%。這意味著國際市場對台積電的樂觀預期，但也要留意短期追價動能是否過度，以及這個溢價能否在盤中維持。
